changes.value: Commands: column.yaml cleanup — move column.reorder declaration in, purge cross-cutting opt-ins

## What

Clean up `swissarmyhammer-kanban/builtin/entities/column.yaml`: migrate `column.reorder` declaration in; purge cross-cutting opt-ins.

### Moves IN

- `column.reorder` full declaration moves from `entity.yaml` to `column.yaml`.

### Moves OUT

Delete these:

- `ui.inspect`
- `entity.paste`

### Files to touch

- `swissarmyhammer-kanban/builtin/entities/column.yaml`
- `swissarmyhammer-commands/builtin/commands/entity.yaml` — remove `column.reorder`.

### Subtasks

- [ ] Move `column.reorder` from entity.yaml into column.yaml.
- [ ] Delete the 2 cross-cutting opt-ins from column.yaml.
- [ ] Hygiene test green for column.yaml.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] `column.yaml`'s `commands:` list contains exactly `column.reorder`.
- [ ] `entity.yaml` no longer contains `column.reorder`.
- [ ] Right-click on a column shows Inspect Column, Paste into Column (when clipboard holds a task), Delete Column, Reorder (palette only).
- [ ] Hygiene test green for column.yaml.

## Tests

- [ ] Existing column-scope emission tests still pass.
- [ ] Run command: `cargo nextest run -p swissarmyhammer-kanban scope_commands column` — all green.

## Workflow

- Use `/tdd`.

#commands

 ## Workflow

 - Use `/tdd`.

+## Implementation Notes
+
+- The full registry declaration for `column.reorder` (with params) was placed in a NEW file `swissarmyhammer-commands/builtin/commands/column.yaml`, wired into `builtin_yaml_sources()` in `swissarmyhammer-commands/src/registry.rs`. This matches the existing rule-header pattern in `entity.yaml` which lists `column.yaml` (alongside `attachment.yaml` and `perspective.yaml`) as the eventual home for type-specific declarations under `swissarmyhammer-commands/builtin/commands/`. The `EntityCommand` struct in `swissarmyhammer-fields` does not carry a `params` field, so the entity yaml at `swissarmyhammer-kanban/builtin/entities/column.yaml` keeps only the metadata-overlay reference (id, name, undoable, visible) — exactly the `commands:` list required by the acceptance criteria.
+- Removed `column.reorder` (id, name, undoable, visible, params) from `swissarmyhammer-commands/builtin/commands/entity.yaml`.
+- Removed the `entity.paste` opt-in from `swissarmyhammer-kanban/builtin/entities/column.yaml`. (`ui.inspect` was already removed in commit f4e66334d as part of the cross-cutting auto-emit migration.)
+- Updated the comment on `builtin_yaml_files_parse` in `swissarmyhammer-commands/src/registry.rs` to reflect the new entity-count-of-14 and add `column: reorder = 1`. Total count remains 62.
+- Hygiene test `yaml_hygiene_no_cross_cutting_in_entity_schemas` no longer lists `column.yaml` as a violator (still flags task.yaml and tag.yaml — those are sister cards 01KPG6XDVSY9DAN2TS26W52NN6 and 01KPG6XPMDHSH8PMD248YK6KAK).
+- All 5 `column_commands` dispatch tests still pass; the column scope_commands tests (167/168 from the targeted run) still pass; `builtin_yaml_files_parse` still passes (count invariant preserved). Full kanban+commands suite: 1316/1317 passing (only the documented hygiene failure remains, by design — it's tracking the not-yet-done sister cards).
+
 #commands
